entries.meaning: Illegal request param. Description: Check and correct the request parameters according to the error message.
Later than the payment deadline. Description: Payment for the booking was initiated later than the payment deadline.
Order status does not support payment. Description: The order status maybe “ticketing” or “ticketed” where the payment has already been made. Check if the order status is unpaid
Unsupported payment method. Description: The payment method is not supported for this order.
The order is already paid. Description: Check if the order has been paid. If “yes”, do not send the payment request
Payment operation is in progress. Description: The previous payment request is still in process. Wait for the airline PNR to be received in the PNR details response.
Some mandatory element for the passenger has not been submitted.. Description: Check the information and correct the same and resubmit.
Passenger can not board alone. Description: Create a new order and add an adult passenger with the child passenger
Additional baggage does not match the flight segment. Description: Luggage purchased for each segment of a connecting flight must be the same.
The contact information is not in the correct format.. Description: Check the contact information and confirm that it matches the required format.
Some error happened with the payment gateway. Description: Some error happened with the payment gateway
No available payment methods. Description: No available payment methods for this order
Card is not supported. Description: For MoR, the brand of the card sent by customer is not supported by Atlas.
Card mismatch. Description: The brand of the card sent during payment is inconsistent with the "cardType" sent when generating the order.
order is not confirmed by user. Description: order is not confirmed by user
